resources.string: You are more capable than you give yourself credit for.
Every small step forward still counts as progress.
You bring something unique to the world that no one else can.
Its okay to take things one day at a time.
Your effort today is building a better tomorrow.
You are allowed to be proud of how far you have come.
Challenges are just opportunities in disguise.
You deserve kindness — especially from yourself.
Growth happens even when you cannot see it yet.
You have overcome hard things before, and you can do it again.
